creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
3) a lot of ports is picking up libiconv (installed by build-time
dependencies), linking against it, and then not having it on runtime
(it's not in their run-time dependency list)

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>
God is real unless declared integer.
